hero.name: Franklin Fofe Nodem
hero.tagline: I build digital products that solve real-world problems. From SaaS platforms to real businesses, I turn ideas into working solutions.
hero.micro2: Software and AI are my tools. Real impact is the goal.

projects.section_sub: Products in production, with real users.

about_snippet.intro: I'm Franklin — a lawyer-turned-builder based in Cameroon.
about_snippet.body: I've spent the last three years building software products that solve real problems for real people. ImmoGest manages properties for real estate agencies across francophone Africa. Kalamundi connects authors and readers. AgroNova produces 700 catfish per cycle — and counting.

remote.tz_note: Full overlap with European business hours

contact_cta.title: Let's work together
contact_cta.body: I'm currently available for remote missions, collaborations, and international employment opportunities.

footer.made: Designed and built by Franklin Fofe Nodem
